name: Stanley Electric U.S.
message: Stanley Electric US is a manufacturer of motorcycle and automotive lighting equipment for Honda and Nissan. This real big fish is going to lose it's internal data of a great size - more than 2TBs. We have not only interesting details about their cooperation with big business names like JP Morgan, Nissan, Honda and others, but also their employees' personal information: thousands of SSNs, passports, medical information, vaccination information. And there are more: incidents, violations, confidential info, tons of contracts and so on and so forth.Priceless data for you soon.
